description_long: This object consists of two police vehicles, both styled as modern SUVs with robust, boxy bodies and four visible wheels each. The vehicles are predominantly dark gray or black, with one featuring a white side panel and clear police markings, including a gold star badge and the word 'SHERIFF' in gold lettering. Both vehicles are equipped with roof-mounted emergency light bars, displaying red, blue, and white lights, and have additional detailing such as side mirrors and front grilles. The windows are tinted dark, and the vehicles have realistic proportions and features typical of law enforcement vehicles used in urban environments. The front grilles are silver with horizontal slats, and the bumpers are reinforced, suggesting durability. The overall appearance is functional and authoritative, suitable for patrolling city streets or responding to emergencies.
description: A pair of modern police SUVs, one with white and gold sheriff markings and both equipped with roof-mounted red, blue, and white emergency lights. The vehicles are dark-colored, robust, and feature realistic law enforcement details.
description_view_0: Side view showing both vehicles, with the left vehicle in solid dark color and the right vehicle displaying white side panels and gold sheriff markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the silver grilles, yellow bumper accents, and the arrangement of emergency lights on the roofs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the sheriff-marked vehicle's white panel and gold badge, with the other vehicle in solid dark color.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back windows and the roof lights, with less detail visible on the rear bumpers.
attribute_police_markings: The right vehicle has 'SHERIFF' in gold block letters and a gold star badge on the front door, with additional small text beneath. The markings are on the white side panel, clearly visible from both side views.
attribute_emergency_lights: Both vehicles have roof-mounted light bars with red, blue, and white segments arranged in a rectangular shape. The light bars are centered on the roof and are prominent from all views.
attribute_police_insignia: A gold star badge is visible on the front door of the right vehicle, serving as a police insignia.
